description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-carousel

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/`
**Sub-components:** hx-carousel-item

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Navigation arrows, dots, spacing. Transition timing. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. ARIA live region for slide changes. Keyboard (arrow keys). Pause on hover/focus. Reduced-motion.
3. **Functionality** — Auto-play. Loop. Swipe/touch. Navigation dots/arrows. Items per view. Responsive breakpoints.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Smooth transitions. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Both carousel + carousel-item documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Navigation. Auto-play. Keyboard. Touch.
8. **Storybook** — Multiple slides. Auto-play. Navigation styles.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Views slideshow integration. Dynamic content.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. No external carousel lib dependency.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-carousel
